title: jj插沙求救 英文翻譯

replies.msg:
想問下 「均經由xxx公司品質檢查部檢測合格後方可出廠銷售」
點譯做英文

想問下 「均經由xxx公司品質檢查部檢測合格後方可出廠銷售」
點譯做英文

It is only allowable to sell the product which is examined by xxx company and passed the quality control testing.


英文拎F

想問下 「均經由xxx公司品質檢查部檢測合格後方可出廠銷售」
點譯做英文

It is only allowable to sell the product which is examined by xxx company and passed the quality control testing.


英文拎F


唔該巴打 有冇其他巴打有更好提議？

想問下 「均經由xxx公司品質檢查部檢測合格後方可出廠銷售」
點譯做英文

All products have been thoroughly examined by the quality control department of xxxcompany name) before releasing for sale.

想問下 「均經由xxx公司品質檢查部檢測合格後方可出廠銷售」
點譯做英文

All products have been thoroughly examined by the quality control department of xxxxx (company name) before releasing for sale.

想問下 「均經由xxx公司品質檢查部檢測合格後方可出廠銷售」
點譯做英文

All products have been thoroughly examined by the quality control department of xxxxx (company name) before releasing for sale.

諗諗下用inspected好過examined
好似inspected常見啲係呢啲句子

想問下 「均經由xxx公司品質檢查部檢測合格後方可出廠銷售」
點譯做英文

All products have been thoroughly examined by the quality control department of xxxxx (company name) before releasing for sale.

諗諗下用inspected好過examined
好似inspected常見啲係呢啲句子


All items have been inspected/ examined by the XXX company before sale.

其實cut短D都得

想問下 「均經由xxx公司品質檢查部檢測合格後方可出廠銷售」
點譯做英文

All products have been thoroughly examined by the quality control department of xxxxx (company name) before releasing for sale.

諗諗下用inspected好過examined
好似inspected常見啲係呢啲句子


All items have been inspected/ examined by the XXX company before sale.

其實cut短D都得

佢想指定QC個部門咪加落去
